description_long: This humanoid robot features a robust, angular frame with a dark, matte metallic exterior and subtle green highlights on its visor and joints. Its head is helmet-like with a single, horizontal green visor, giving it a futuristic and tactical appearance. The torso is broad and armored, with pronounced shoulder plates and a slightly tapered waist, while the limbs are segmented and mechanical, suggesting strong articulation. Copper-colored cables run from the back of the head to the upper back, adding an industrial, functional detail. The left arm is equipped with a large, rectangular attachment resembling a tool or weapon, and the hands are claw-like with articulated fingers. The overall design is utilitarian and imposing, suitable for urban patrol or security roles.
description: A dark, armored humanoid robot with a green visor, copper cables, and a large tool-like attachment on its left arm.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad chest, helmeted head with green visor, and the large rectangular attachment on the left arm.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the copper cables running from the head to the back and the thickness of the arm attachment.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the full routing of the copper cables and the segmented, mechanical structure of the back and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the angular armor plating and the articulated joints of the limbs.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with legs slightly apart, left arm extended forward holding a large attachment, right arm relaxed at the side, head facing forward.
attribute_clothing_style: No clothing; exterior consists of integrated armor panels and mechanical coverings with visible cables.
attribute_facial_features: Face is a helmet-like structure with a single horizontal green visor; no mouth, nose, or expressive features visible.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have multiple visible hinge and rotary joints at shoulders, elbows, wrists, hips, knees, and ankles, allowing for a wide range of motion; hands have articulated fingers.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Single green visor on the head likely functions as a visual sensor; no other sensors visible.
